title: Jerrit

'''Jerrit''' was a native of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]],<ref name="TAL" /> an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="GatOR">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].<ref name="CSWE" /> This war between the Republic and the resurgent forces of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] began in the Outer Rim, where the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorians]] made a three-pronged assault against the Republic in [[3963 BBY]]. In the aftermath of this assault, known by the Republic media as the "Onslaught," Jerrit received a promotion to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]<ref name="TAL" /> for [[Gender/Legends|his]] heroic efforts during the fighting.<ref name="CSWE" /> His promotion, reported in the [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication of the Republic Navy, occurred alongside that of notable officer [[Saul Karath]] to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]]. Jerrit was a courageous soldier, and consequently recognized by the Republic Navy for his heroic efforts during the Onslaught.<ref name="TAL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jerrit was created by [[John Jackson Miller]], the author of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], and was mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', appended to [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]]. This [[in-universe]] news source is designed as "an official communique for the Republic providing news from the 'regular navy' point of view," inspired by the "Napoleonic-era Britain's Naval Chronicle."<ref name="DH Boards">{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?p=143036|thread=News from the world of KOTOR -- literally!|user=[[John Jackson Miller]]|date=2006-12-18}}</ref> Some of the promotions presented here are said to be confirmations of ones received on the battlefield, but it is not specified which these are or which are regular promotions.<ref name="TAL" />

In the original source, Jerrit was not given either a [[Species/Legends|species]] or gender; however, a subsequent entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' specified both.<ref name="CSWE" />
